content.text:
Now I can clearly see atom C:12 and all its covalently bonded neighbours. Based on my visual inspection from multiple angles, here are the results:

## Atom C:12 — Neighbour Atoms

| Atomic Index | Element |
|---|---|
| 11 | C |
| 13 | C |
| 44 | Cl |

**Explanation:**
From the zoomed and rotated views, atom **C:12** is part of an aromatic/heterocyclic ring system and has three covalent bonds:
1. **C:11** — bonded within the ring (upper-left direction)
2. **C:13** — bonded within the ring (lower direction)
3. **Cl:44** — a chlorine substituent attached to C:12 (to the right)

## Geomconf Index
The **geomconf_index** for this molecule is **5880** (derived from the filename `geomconf_5880.xyz`).

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 12, whose element should be C. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
